name: Wan2GP (fork) — durable queue
readme:
# Wan2GP (fork) — durable generation queue

WanGP with a durable generation queue: the pending queue is written to `queue.zip` on every mutation and on SIGTERM, and auto-restores in a new browser session. The template mounts a Network Volume at `/workspace` and runs with `--config /workspace`, so the queue, outputs, media cache, config and HF models all persist across pod stops/restarts.

Open port `7860/http` for the Gradio UI. First boot clones the fork into `/workspace`; later boots pull updates. See the repo's `QUEUE_PERSISTENCE_PLAN.md` and `runpod/README.md`.
